summary:
Fixed stale-cache bug.

Changes made in app/server.py:

1. After updating a product (PUT /products/{id})
   • Delete product’s cache key products:{id}
   • Delete products:list cache entry
   • Optionally re-cache the updated product

2. After creating a product (POST /products)
   • Delete products:list cache entry

Running ./test.sh now passes:

PASS: Product name correctly updated …
PASS: Product list correctly shows …
PASS: Cache correctly invalidated after writes
